title: EnderSlender
description: Dare to face Slenderman in the blocky world!
body:
Bring the terrifying presence of Slenderman into your Minecraft world with this resource pack! This pack reimagines the iconic Endermen as Slenderman, complete with a creepy, elongated figure and a sinister aura. As you explore the world, be prepared for the haunting presence of Slenderman stalking you in the shadows, silently waiting to strike. Whether you’re a fan of horror or just want to add a darker, more unsettling twist to your gameplay, this pack is sure to keep you on edge.

- **Complete Transformation:** Endermen have been entirely reworked to resemble Slenderman, giving them a chilling new look.
- **Atmospheric Enhancements:** The eerie silence and subtle details add an extra layer of tension to your encounters.
- **No Changes to Gameplay:** While the appearance is altered, Endermen still function exactly the same, making this pack compatible with any world or mod setup.
